title: Adjustable garment system
abstract: A garment system may include trousers that include a pair of trouser legs and a trouser-top. The system may also include a separable-seam on each trouser leg's outside, the entire separable-seam is user adjustable, and each separable-seam runs from each trouser leg's bottom to the trouser-top. The system may further include a crotch-seam on the inside of each trouser leg and the crotch-seam runs from one trouser leg's bottom to the other trouser leg's bottom. The system may additionally include a jacket, and a retainer carried by the jacket that stows the trousers in a first state, and deploys the trousers in a second state without a user taking off the jacket. The system may further include a positioner fastened to the trouser-top and the jacket, and the positioner aids the user when the separable-seam is adjusted.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A system comprising: trousers including a pair of trouser legs and a trouser-top; a separable-seam on each trouser leg's outside, the entire separable-seam is user adjustable, and each separable-seam runs from each trouser leg's bottom to the trouser-top; a crotch-seam on the inside of each trouser leg and the crotch-seam runs from one trouser leg's bottom to the other trouser leg's bottom; a jacket; a retainer carried by the jacket that stows the trousers in a first state, and deploys the trousers in a second state without a user taking off the jacket; and a positioner fastened to the trouser-top and the jacket, the positioner aids the user when the separable- seam is adjusted. 2. The system of claim 1 wherein each trouser leg extends down from the trousers-top and ends near each calf of the user instead of each ankle of the user. 3. The system of claim 1 wherein each trouser leg extends down from the trouser-top and ends near each knee of the user instead of each ankle of the user. 4. The system of claim 1 wherein the trousers are weather-resistant. 5. The system of claim 4 wherein the weather- resistant trousers limits at least one of wind and water from reaching a user's portion protected by the weather- resistant trousers. 6. The system of claim 5 wherein the jacket is weather-resistant and forms a weather-resistant shell for a user in the second state that protects a user's portion protected by the weather-resistant trousers and weather resistant jacket. 7. The system of claim 1 wherein the positioner is positioned near a user's waist; and wherein the crotch- seam is not user adjustable. 8. A system comprising: weather-resistant trousers including a trouser- top and a pair of trouser legs where each trouser leg extends down from the trouser-top and ends near each knee 

of a user instead of each ankle of the user, and the weather-resistant trousers limit at least one of wind and water from reaching a user's portion protected by the weather-resistant trousers; a separable-seam on each trouser leg's outside, the entire separable-seam is user adjustable, and each separable-seam runs from each trouser leg's bottom to the weather-resistant trouser-top; a crotch-seam on the inside of each trouser leg and the crotch-seam runs from one trouser leg's bottom to the other trouser leg's bottom; and a positioner fastened to the trouser-top, the positioner engages a user and aids the user when the separable-seam is adjusted, and the positioner works independently of the separable-seam. 9. The system of claim 8 further comprising: a jacket; a retainer carried by the jacket that stows the weather-resistant trousers in a first state, and deploys the weather-resistant trousers in a second state without a user taking off the jacket. 10. The system of claim 9 wherein the jacket is weather-resistant and forms a weather-resistant shell for a user in the second state that protects a user's portion 

protected by the weather-resistant trousers and weather resistant jacket. 11. The system of claim 8 wherein the positioner is at least one of positioned near a user's waist and positioned at a user's shoulders; and wherein the crotch- seam is not user adjustable. 12. A system comprising: trousers including a pair of trouser legs and a trouser-top; a separable-seam on each trouser leg's outside, the entire separable-seam is user adjustable, and each separable-seam runs from each trouser leg's bottom to the trouser-top; a crotch-seam on the inside of each trouser leg and the crotch-seam runs from one trouser leg's bottom to the other trouser leg's bottom; and a positioner fastened to the trouser-top, the positioner engages a user and aids the user when the separable-seam is adjusted, and the positioner works independently of the separable-seam. 13. The system of claim 12 wherein each trouser leg extends down from the trouser-top and ends near each calf of the user instead of each ankle of the user. 14. The system of claim 12 wherein each trouser leg extends down from the trouser-top and ends near each knee of the user instead of each ankle of the user. 15. The system of claim 12 wherein the trousers are weather-resistant. 16. The system of claim 15 wherein the weather- resistant trousers limits at least one of wind and water from reaching a user's portion protected by the weather- resistant trousers. 17. The system of claim 12 further comprising: a jacket; a retainer carried by the jacket that stows the trousers in a first state, and deploys the trousers in a second state without a user taking off the jacket. 18. The system of claim 17 wherein the jacket and trousers are weather-resistant and form a weather- resistant shell for a user in the second state that protects a user's portion protected by the weather- resistant trousers and weather resistant jacket. 19. The system of claim 12 wherein the positioner is at least one of positioned near a user's 

waist and positioned at a user's shoulders; and wherein the crotch-seam is not user adjustable. 20. The system of claim 17 wherein the positioner permanently attaches the trousers to the jacket.
